title: Configuration
description: Full HoundOptions, processor, retry, and DLQ reference

blocks.text: Pass options to Hound.create() to configure the instance:

rows: Shared app context passed to all handlers
Bearer token required by the HTTP gateway
Directories to scan for *.job.ts files on start

blocks.text: Fine-tune the processor with the processor sub-option:

rows: How often the processor polls for new jobs
How long before a stalled job is reclaimed by the Reaper
How long completed and failed job records are kept
Max log entries stored per job
Queue ordering — lower number = higher priority

blocks.text: Set default retry behaviour in processor.retry. These defaults can be overridden per handler or per emit:
Configure a DLQ to capture jobs that have exhausted all retry attempts. Failed jobs are written to a Redis stream for later inspection or replay:
Read the DLQ stream with XREAD to inspect or replay failed jobs. Each entry contains the full JobRecord serialized as a JSON string.
